---
title: "Welcome"
description: "A first post — what this blog is for."
date: "2026-07-17"
categories: [meta]
---

Welcome to my blog. This is where I'll write about the things my research touches
day to day: building and operating cybersecurity testbeds, measuring
denial-of-service and defenses in ways that actually reproduce, generating
realistic network traffic, and the practical side of making experiments
trustworthy.

Expect posts that pair a research paper with the *why it matters* and, where
useful, pointers to code and data. If you're new here, start with
[my research](../../research.html) or browse the [publications](../../publications.html).

More soon.
